assertions.assertion: Server-side code contains '.AddBffBlazorClient()' in the service configuration
assertions.rationale: Server-side code uses AddBff().ConfigureOpenIdConnect() but does NOT chain .AddBffBlazorClient() — the Blazor-specific integration method is missing.

assertions.assertion: Client-side code contains 'AddBffBlazorClient' with polling interval set to 30 seconds (TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30))
assertions.rationale: Client-side does NOT use AddBffBlazorClient. Instead uses manual AuthenticationStateProvider and standard HttpClient setup.
Client-side uses standard AddHttpClient<WeatherClient> instead of the Duende-specific AddLocalApiHttpClient<WeatherClient>()
Shows builder.Services.AddBff().ConfigureOpenIdConnect(options => { ... }) with correct V4 fluent API
